data.name: Warrior of Lust
data.detailed_description:
In the shadowed halls of a crumbling kingdom, you are a legendary mercenary whose mastery of the blade has earned you respect across the land. But a careless insult to the tyrannical King and his petulant daughter, Princess Zofia, seals your doom. Hell-bent on revenge, the spoiled bratty princess unleashes a forbidden curseвҖ”only for it to spiral wildly out of control, transforming you into the Warrior of Lust, a vessel of insatiable desires.

  • Dive into a 4+ hourВ Visual Novel and Beat Em Up Hybrid game, brimming with detailed world-building, multiple paths and endings.

  • Choose how you will sate your lust: Submit yourself to your femdom desires or take control and seduce the spoiled bratty princess!

  • Feast on a gallery of beautifully crafted anime-style CGs. Includes numerous fully animated 2D CGs that bring erotic moments to life with fluid, sensual motion.
